shardDownloadPrompt: To reconstruct the secret, go to {link}.
shardVersionInfo: This has been generated by BananaSplit version {version}
infoWhatIsThisBody: Banana Split is a web app that makes your paper backups more resilient and secure using {link}. You can encrypt and split particularly sensitive information so that it's not physically stored in one place — your master password, seed phrase, etc.
infoHowBody1: After you type in your secret into Banana Split, it will be encrypted with an autogenerated passphrase and split into N QR-codes, ready to be printed out. You'll need N/2+1 of those printouts to reconstruct the secret, and then the passphrase to decrypt it.
infoHowBody2: Banana Split tries to protect your secret from the attack vectors like "attacker is able to intercept everything you're sending to your printer", and that's why you'll have to write down the passphrase on your printouts by hand.
infoHowBody3: Of course you should seal your printouts in non-transparent envelopes and distribute among different locations as soon as you're done writing your seed phrase — Banana Split is only more secure than a single paper with your secret as long as the secrets can't be lost/stolen altogether.
infoHowBody4: Recovery can be done on any device with a webcam — just show your QR codes to the webcam and follow the notifications on screen. Also available as an Android/Windows app.
infoStep1: Click Create and enter your secret
infoStep2: Choose the number of shards and print or save the QR codes
infoStep3: Write the passphrase by hand on every printout and distribute them to different locations
infoMinimalRisk: All cryptography happens locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.
